alanon.title: Al-Anon
alanon.subtitle: Resources for friends and family of alcoholics.
alanon.tradition6: NECYPAA is not affiliated with Al-Anon Family Groups, Inc. This page is provided as a resource for friends and family of alcoholics attending or interested in our convention. The links below are outbound resources — you will be leaving our site.
alanon.alanonDescription: Al-Anon Family Groups provide support for families and friends of alcoholics. Whether or not the alcoholic in your life recognizes the existence of a drinking problem or seeks help, Al-Anon can help you.
alanon.findMeetingDescription: Search for Al-Anon meetings near you or anywhere in the world.
alanon.alanonByStateDescription: Find your state's Al-Anon resources. Each link takes you to that state's Al-Anon website.
alanon.alateenByStateDescription: Alateen is for younger family members and friends of alcoholics. Some states share an Al-Anon/Alateen site; others have a dedicated Alateen page.

states.title: Member States
states.subtitle: Local AA resources, intergroups, and young people's groups across the NECYPAA region.
